section.heading: Purpose
section.chapeau: The purpose of this subchapter is to facilitate the efficient recycling or proper disposal of used nickel-cadmium rechargeable batteries, used small sealed lead-acid rechargeable batteries, other regulated batteries, and such rechargeable batteries in used consumer products, by—

paragraph.content: providing for uniform labeling requirements and streamlined regulatory requirements for regulated battery collection programs; and
encouraging voluntary industry programs by eliminating barriers to funding the collection and recycling or proper disposal of used rechargeable batteries.
